title: [TACZ]Enchanted Arsenal
description: A mod that adds enchantments designed to work with tacz guns
body:
# features
- 8 enchantments
- 2 curses

<details>
<summary>Enchantments</summary>

| Enchantment         | Max level             | incompatibilities    |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| Lightweight         | 2              | Juggernaught             |
| Juggernaught        | 2              |  Lightweight             |
| Poison Tipped       | 1              |  Cindering Shells             |
| Cindering Shells    | 1              |  Poison Tipped             |
| Illumination        | 1              |  Shell Shock             |
| Shell Shock         | 1              |  Illumination             |
| Armour Piercing     | 5              |  Hollow Point             |
| Hollow Point        | 5              |  Armour piercing             |
| Curse Of Overpressuring| 1              |  none             |
| Curse Of Overrecoiling| 1              |  none             |

# What they all do

## Enchantments

### Lightweight  
Speeds up the player

### Juggernaught  
Makes the player more resistant but slows them down

### Poison Tipped  
Attacked enemies are poisoned for a short time

### Cindering shells  
Attacked enemies are set on fire for a short time

### Illumination  
Makes attacked enemies glow for a short time

### Shell Shock  
Hit targets will have impaired vision for a short time

### Armour Piercing  
Will deal damage to your hits targets armour, the level determines the ammount of damage inflicted on armour

### Hollow point  
Has a chance to deal an extra half heart of damage, the level increases chance of extra damage being delt

## Curses

### Curse Of Overpressuring  
The gun will sometimes overgas(temporarily blind the user) when the gun is shot

### Curse Of Overrecoiling  
The extra kick will sometimes leave the user out of breath(temporarily slow down the user) when the gun is shot

</details>

## !important!
### Each enchantments enchanted books can ONLY be found from loot chests or villager trades AS OF NOW

### As of 1.0.1 theres is enchantment descriptions support
